Notice Of Motion For Application For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Andonian of Hemar Rousso & Heald, LLP (818.501.3800 x148) appearing via court call for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances. The Court reviewed the proof of service filed on July 26, 2010, and granted PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA'S MOTION FOR APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported
